|desc={{p|Ampharos}} is a Pokémon belonging to Molayne that Sophocles borrowed for a project at the [[Mossdeep Space Center]]. It was used to help guide the {{p|Talonflame}}2 probe back to the planet. After the equipment broke down, Ampharos temporarily  lost its confidence, but with help from {{AP|Pikachu}}, {{TP|Sophocles|Togedemaru}}, and {{TP|Goh|Raichu}}, it was able to guide the probe down.

None of Ampharos's moves are known.}}
